creator: mikael@nollbudget.dyndns.org
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
 # this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
 # create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
 # have default permissions.
 #
 # This archive contains:
 #
 #	/usr/ports/audio/teknap
 #	/usr/ports/audio/teknap/Makefile
 #	/usr/ports/audio/teknap/distinfo
 #	/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-comment
 #	/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-descr
 #	/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-message
 #	/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-plist
 #
 echo c - /usr/ports/audio/teknap
 mkdir -p /usr/ports/audio/teknap > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - /usr/ports/audio/teknap/Makefile
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/teknap/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/Makefile'
 X# New ports collection makefile for:	TekNap napster client
 X# Date created:				11 June 2001
 X# Whom:					Mikael Jacobson
 X#
 X# $FreeBSD$
 X#
 X
 XPORTNAME=	TekNap
 XPORTVERSION=	1.3f
 XCATEGORIES=	audio
 XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.teknap.com/pub/TekNap/
 X
 XMAINTAINER=	mikael.jacobson@home.se
 X
 X.if defined(WITH_MP3)
 XBUILD_DEPENDS=	mpg123:${PORTSDIR}/audio/mpg123
 X.endif
 X.if defined(WITH_XMMS)
 XBUILD_DEPENDS=	xmms:${PORTSDIR}/audio/xmms
 X.endif
 X
 XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/TekNap
 X
 XPLIST_SUB+=	PORTVERSION="${PORTVERSION}"
 X
 XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
 XWANT_GTK=	yes
 XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 XCONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="-I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
 X		LIBS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 X
 X.if defined(HAVE_GTK)
 XUSE_GTK=	yes
 XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-gtk
 X.else
 XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=--without-gtk
 X.endif
 X
 X.if defined(WITH_MP3)
 XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-mp3
 X.endif
 X
 X.if defined(WITH_XMMS)
 XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=--enable-xmms
 X.endif
 X
 Xpre-extract:
 X	@${ECHO} "Available switches:"
 X	@${ECHO} "-------------------"
 X	@${ECHO} "WITH_MP3 - Support MP3 playback"
 X	@${ECHO} "WITH_XMMS - Support XMMS"
 X
 Xpre-configure:
 X	@${PERL} -pi -e "s:-lc_r:${PTHREAD_LIBS}:g" ${WRKSRC}/configure
 X
 Xpost-install:
 X.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 X	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/TekNap
 X	${TAR} --directory ${WRKSRC}/teknap-help -cf - . --exclude CVS | \
 X	${TAR} --directory ${PREFIX}/share/TekNap/help -xf -
 X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${PREFIX}/share/doc/TekNap
 X	@${ECHO}
 X	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE} | ${SED} -e "s:%%PREFIX%%:${PREFIX}:g"
 X	@${ECHO}
 X.endif
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
 END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/Makefile
 echo x - /usr/ports/audio/teknap/distinfo
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/teknap/distinfo << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/distinfo'
 XMD5 (TekNap-1.3f.tar.gz) = 95354f338a0fe2db0c6083b7ad212361
 END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/distinfo
 echo x - /usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-comment
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-comment << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-comment'
 XConsole napster client
 END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-comment
 echo x - /usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-descr
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-descr << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-descr'
 XTekNap is a console Napster client using curses/ncurses/termcap and
 Xpthreads if available. It has powerful scripting features based on
 XBitchX/Epic scripting, support for both Napster and opennap servers,
 Xand a full-screen browse/search mode.
 X
 X
 XAuthor: Colten Edwards <edwards@bitchx.dimension6.com>
 XWWW: http://www.teknap.com
 END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-descr
 echo x - /usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-message
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-message << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-message'
 XPlease read %%PREFIX%%/share/doc/TekNap/README
 END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-message
 echo x - /usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-plist
 sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-plist << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/teknap/pkg-plist'
